items.title: UPQODE Website Approval Needed Today
items.summary: UPQODE team is blocked and needs final approval on website copy changes to push to production. They have a client demo tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve website copy changes or flag remaining edits.

items.title: Partnership Proposal from Hydrate IV Bar
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar proposes co-branded IV therapy packages for Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want a 20-minute call this week.
items.actionNeeded: Schedule 20-minute call Thursday or Friday to discuss partnership proposal.

items.title: LeadMaker Sales SDR Proposal Follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker following up on full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting sent on May 9th.
items.actionNeeded: Review SDR proposal and decide whether to schedule call to review candidates.
